prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约1939→3225→3710→4976→6019，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约4080名；近3年每年后移幅度约800–1100名，2025年基准约6019名；本省物理类计划2021年28人、2022年35人、2023年28人、2024年35人、2025年38人；2026年计划39人，较2025年仅扩招1人（+2.6%），扩招幅度极小，对竞 争缓解作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜约第35名（2021–2026年稳定在33–35名），为财经类院校最高排名，全国顶尖财经学府；2021–2026年学校声誉文件中未见上海财经大学相关负面或正面舆情事件，声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第99位，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量在财经类院校中处于中 等水平，无明显报考热度信号；工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，共4个A类学科，财经学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经类专业整体社会热度近年有所降温，但上海财经大学作为财经类头部院校受影响相对有限；本省2026年高考总人数267900人，按近年物理类占比约75%估算 物理类考生约20.1万人，较2025年19.2万人增加约4.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；上海财经大学位于上海市，为一线城市财经名 校，对福建省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在福建省招生计划近年持续小幅增加，反映对福建生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划仅微扩1人 、本省物理类考生增加约4.6%等因素，预计2026年竞争继续加剧但后移幅度收窄；预测最低位次约6144名，区间5644–6644名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1939 → 3225 → 3710 → 4976 → 6019, continuously declining for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative decline of about 4080 places; in the past 3 years, the annual decline was about 800–1100 places, with a baseline of about 6019 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 28 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 38 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 39, an increase of only 1 (+2.6%) compared to 2025, a very small expansion with limited effect on easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 35th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese Universities (stable at 33–35 from 2021 to 2026), the highest ranking among finance and economics institutions, a top national finance and economics university; from 2021 to 2026, no negative or positive public opinion events related to Shanghai University of Finance and Economics were found in the school reputation documents, with a stable reputation; Douyin heat total ranking is 99th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium level among finance and economics institutions, showing no obvious application heat signal; Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, a total of 4 A-level disciplines, with top national strength in finance and economics disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of finance and economics majors has cooled in recent years, but Shanghai University of Finance and Economics, as a top finance and economics institution, is relatively less affected; the total number of Gaokao candidates in the province in 2026 is 267,900, with an estimated Physics Category candidates of about 201,000 based on a recent Physics Category proportion of about 75%, an increase of about 4.6% from 192,000 in 2025, with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying competition; Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city and a famous finance and economics school, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Fujian candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Fujian has been steadily increasing in recent years, reflecting the importance placed on Fujian students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings, the 2026 plan with only a slight increase of 1 person, and the increase in provincial Physics Category candidates by about 4.6%, it is expected that competition will continue to intensify in 2026 but the decline will narrow; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6144, with a range of 5644–6644.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 326 → 591 → 697 → 695 → 851, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it briefly stabilized (695th), but in 2025, it significantly moved back to 851st, a backward shift of 156 places compared to 2024. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 10 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 13, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion signal.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 35th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, the highest among finance and economics institutions, making it a top national finance and economics school. The school's reputation is stable with no negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average, with no abnormal signals in application heat. Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, indicating top national strength in finance and economics disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring History Category students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of finance and economics majors has cooled in recent years, but top-tier schools are less affected. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in the province is 267,900. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 25%, the estimated number of History Category examinees is approximately 67,000, an increase of about 11.2% compared to 60,000 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in examinee scale and intensified competition. Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with obvious regional advantages, strongly attracting History Category examinees from Fujian Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the unchanged 2026 plan, and the approximately 11.2% increase in History Category examinees, it is expected that competition will continue to intensify in 2026, with rankings moving further back but to a limited extent. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 881st, with a range of 749 to 1,013.
